operational_knowledge_units.title: Sorter Sweeper module acts as the tote state machine and task creator
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that the Sorter Sweeper module functions as the tote state machine. It receives data from the sorter, tippers, hospital station, and HMI, and creates tote tasks for execution by robotics modules.
observed_evidence: The Sorter Sweeper module functions as the state machine for totes.
It receives data from the sorter, tippers, hospital station, and HMI, creating tasks for totes with the robotics modules to execute.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Sweeper module detailed design: acts as the state machine for totes, receives data from sorter, tippers, hospital station, and HMI, and creates tote tasks for robotics modules to execute.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Sorter Sweeper notifies tippers about tote arrival and robot faults
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Sorter Sweeper module sends notifications to tippers when a tote arrives and when there is a robot fault.
observed_evidence: It also notifies tippers when a tote arrives or when there is a robot fault
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Sweeper module notification behavior: notifies tippers when a tote arrives and when a robot fault occurs.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Sorter Sweeper processes hospital data
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The module processes data originating from the hospital subsystem.
observed_evidence: and processes data from the hospital.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Sweeper detailed design includes processing data from the hospital.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Defined tote task types handled by the Sorter Sweeper module
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide enumerates the tote task types associated with the Sorter Sweeper module: Induct Tote, Remove Tote, Pickup Tote, Move Out Sorter, Drop Off Sorter, and Drop Off Hospital.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Sweeper module tote task list: Induct Tote, Remove Tote, Pickup Tote, Move Out Sorter, Drop Off Sorter, Drop Off Hospital.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: No reusable operator or support procedure present on Sorter Sweeper detailed design slide
preconditions: Reviewing slide content for explicit action sequence
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Bullet list describing Sorter Sweeper module behavior and enumerating tote task names, without numbered or ordered operational instructions.
warnings: Slide provides module behavior and task categories, not an explicit action sequence.
Task names such as Induct Tote and Remove Tote are listed without user or system execution steps.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Discarded as procedure candidate: Sorter Sweeper detailed design slide contains architectural behavior and tote task names only; no explicit reusable procedure steps are shown.
